title: LetterboxdFeedItem
description: Normalized item after parsing the public Letterboxd RSS feed (build-time). Field names are implementation-facing; RSS source may use title/link/pubDate/description.

title.description: Entry title from RSS item (often film name + activity).

link.description: Permalink to diary entry, review, or list on Letterboxd.

summary.description: Optional short text from description; strip HTML in implementation.
